items.title_original: In disclosures to investors, Anthropic says it expects to generate $10.9B in revenue in Q2, vs. $4.8B in Q1, and turn a $559M operating profit, its first ever (Berber Jin/Wall Street Journal)

items.title_zh: 在向投资者披露的信息中，Anthropic 表示，预计第二季度将产生 10.9 亿美元的收入，而第一季度为 4.8 亿美元，并首次实现 5.59 亿美元的营业利润（Berber Jin/华尔街日报）

items.title: Three precedent-setting court rulings in China have said that employers replacing workers with AI is voluntary cost-cutting that does not justify mass layoffs (Catie Edmondson/New York Times)
items.title_original: Three precedent-setting court rulings in China have said that employers replacing workers with AI is voluntary cost-cutting that does not justify mass layoffs (Catie Edmondson/New York Times)
items.title_en: Three precedent-setting court rulings in China have said that employers replacing workers with AI is voluntary cost-cutting that does not justify mass layoffs (Catie Edmondson/New York Times)
items.title_zh: 中国三项开创先例的法院裁决称，雇主用人工智能取代工人是自愿削减成本，并不能证明大规模裁员是合理的（Catie Edmondson/纽约时报）
items.title_bilingual: 中国三项开创先例的法院裁决称，雇主用人工智能取代工人是自愿削减成本，并不能证明大规模裁员是合理的（Catie Edmondson/纽约时报） / Three precedent-setting court rulings in China have said that employers replacing workers with AI is voluntary cost-cutting that does not justify mass layoffs (Catie Edmondson/New York Times)

items.title_bilingual: 越南推出第 142 号法令来实施其人工智能法，要求公司按风险级别对人工智能模型进行分类、标记 Deepfakes 并披露聊天机器人的使用情况（Lien Hoang/日经亚洲） / Vietnam introduces Decree 142 to implement its AI law, requiring companies to classify AI models by risk level, label deepfakes, and disclose chatbot use (Lien Hoang/Nikkei Asia)
